symbols: bread — daily sustenance, echoing the petition 'give us this day our daily bread'
laden table — God's provision and abundance in the created order
soup tureen — communal nourishment and the domestic hearth
description: A table covered with a pale cloth is laden with food and kitchen items. At center stands a large cream-colored soup tureen with a floral motif and a bulging lid. To the left, a yellow coffee or tea pot. In the foreground lie several long bread rolls, a small round fruit or nut, a brown bowl of dark liquid, and a fork. A plate with sliced bread sits to the right. A large, plump tabby cat with white and orange markings sits at the right edge of the table, gazing out at the viewer. Behind the table a wooden chair is visible. The background is a muted domestic interior with a door on the left.
